case_title: JAIME S. GONZALEZ GASCA VS. US 3 FINE FOODS LLC,A SUSPENDED CALIFORNIA LIMITED

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ GASCA, JAIME S.
